title: UK SME Tech Auditor Input
description: Input schema for auditing UK SME websites and scoring IT outsourcing leads.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of UK company websites or industry directory pages to audit.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests Per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages the crawler will process.

minScoreThreshold.title: Minimum Score Threshold
minScoreThreshold.description: Only enrich leads with outsourcing score equal to or above this threshold.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Target industry for scoring and pitch angle.

companySize.title: Company Size
companySize.description: Typical size category of target companies.

enableEnrichment.title: Enable Decision Maker Enrichment
enableEnrichment.description: Use Proxycurl to enrich high-scoring leads with CTO/IT Director/Founder data.

proxycurlApiKey.title: Proxycurl API Key
proxycurlApiKey.description: Required if enrichment is enabled. Get one at https://nubela.co/proxycurl.

ollamaBaseUrl.title: Ollama Base URL
ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL of your Ollama server. Leave default for local Ollama.

ollamaModel.title: Ollama Model
ollamaModel.description: Open-source model to use. Must be available/pulled in Ollama.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Choose whether to output JSON, CSV, or both.
